markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Magic, focusing on SEO and content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Magic seeks to scale content production and improve SEO performance; currently produces \~2 blog posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive SEO expertise, content creation (5-7 posts/week), and LLM visibility optimization](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15k/month with 8-week initial phase, followed by 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Decision hinges on Magic's willingness to invest $150k+ annually in content marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Status and Challenges

  - [Magic's domain authority: 40, with 30,000 backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [\~6,000-7,000 organic searches/month (US traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Flat SEO performance due to lack of dedicated resources](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Agency relationship ($5k/month) not scaling content effectively](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

### GrowthX Offerings and Differentiators

  - [Increase from 2 to 5-7 blog posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [White-glove service: staging and publishing in client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [LLM visibility optimization and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Comprehensive SEO expertise beyond content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Case studies: Augment (2.5x traffic in 3 months), Tiro (6.5x in 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Magic's Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Athena, Wing Assistant](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Differentiators: 10-year history, flexibility, no minimum commitments](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Unique feature: Magic 24/7 app for round-the-clock assistance](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Structure

  - [$15k/month starting price](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [8-week initial phase, followed by 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Earliest start date: November 3rd or 10th](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Dedicated team: Managing Director, Managing Editor with SEO/content expertise](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

### Decision Factors for Magic

  - [Evaluating $150k annual investment vs. current $5k/month agency spend](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Potential for exponential results and higher ROI than paid marketing](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [Need for internal discussion on prioritizing content as a growth channel](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to discuss potential partnership with Ruben (Magic's decision-maker)](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [GrowthX to send additional product documentation and service details](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with Marcel (GrowthX) for in-depth platform demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [Magic to evaluate commitment to content marketing as a primary growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/4EKyyax7nKpMyYfVVbvMFTNMUU7Np6x7?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
